title: Zoom level timeline
excerpt:

posts.author: TimA (Tim)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to have deeper zoom level where, when you select “day” level i need to see more details and bigger blocks.
We want to see the activities per week, but now there is way to much empty space, and the blocks in the timeline are too small to show a meaningfull title.
Can you add an extra zoom level?

zoomlevel1594×829 72.7 KB

posts.author: John.Bourke (John Bourke)
posts.cookedHtml: +1 the timeline view is unusable with columns which are so narrow. Also if it is not possible to clearly identify each task in the timeline, it is not just unusable., it is an annoyance that an unusable feature exists.
